CLEAN_CUT.title: CLEAN CUT
text: Downtown is half-boarded, but the water is finally clearing.
You told the truth and paid in full.

FUNCTIONAL_MASK.title: FUNCTIONAL MASK
text: The lake reopens under enhanced monitoring.
Frothy PR videos. Carefully worded advisories.
A few dead fish, if you know where to look.
People still ski. Still post selfies.
Reality and branding hold an uneasy truce.

LIVING_LIE.title: LIVING LIE
text: The lake reopens under enhanced monitoring.
Dead fish are edited out of the photos.
Your personal life is stable. Your integrity bar is dust.
